strengths: Clean separation of concerns: context-bound factory with injected fetch dependencies
Well-structured with extracted constants (DEFAULT_WEEKS, MAX_WEEKS, etc.) and helper functions (parseDataTypes, clampInt)
Defensive input parsing with proper clamping for weeks [1,26] and windowDays [1,365]
Try/catch wraps all fetch/compute operations, returning structured error with errorCode DB_ERROR
ActivityItem interface uses optional fields + index signature for forward compatibility
7 comprehensive tests covering all DELIVERABLE scenarios plus edge cases
TDD approach: tests reference the implementation module correctly
Conventional commit message: feat(agent): add read-only query_board_data tool

issues.description: Type assertion `cards as CardTimestamps[]` after null check could be avoided with a guard clause (e.g., `if (!cards) cards = []`), but correctness is not affected
